subject: [PATCH v2 051/110] fsnotify: use PRIino format for i_ino

reviews.author: Jeff Layton (author)
reviews.summary: The author acknowledged that the PRIino format is not applicable to all i_ino values and agreed to restructure in v2.

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the patch is good and suggested adding a Reviewed-by tag.
reviews.raw_body:
Looks good. Feel free to add:

Reviewed-by: Jan Kara <jack@suse.cz>

								Honza

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch updates the fsnotify code to use PRIino format for displaying inode numbers (i_ino). This is a preparation step for widening i_ino via kino_t, which will allow it to hold larger values. The changes are made in the fdinfo.c file where inode numbers are printed.
